sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
Two perfumes. One unforgettable impression.

Some perfumes are made for daily wear. This set is made for the moments where your presence should stay in the room, even after you leave. The Signature Seduction Set brings together two bold fragrances — Cuddle Monkey and 69 Oud Rose — created for people who like their scent to feel warm, confident, and slightly addictive.

Cuddle Monkey opens with cardamom, ginger, and cinnamon, giving it a spicy-sweet start. It then moves into candied fruit, white flowers, and praline before settling into coffee, tonka bean, benzoin, musk, and vanilla. The result feels smooth, cozy, and tempting. ✨

69 Oud Rose brings a deeper mood. Pepper, ginger, and labdanum create a strong opening, followed by agarwood, tobacco, tonka bean, and rose. The base of patchouli, sandalwood, vanilla, and amber gives it a rich, long-lasting finish. 🔥

Together, this duo gives you two signature moods — soft temptation and bold luxury.

Why You'll Love It 😍

-> Pack of 2 Premium Perfumes

-> Warm, Addictive Notes 

-> Perfect for Evenings

-> Long-Lasting Feel

-> Unisex Appeal

Note: Protect from sunlight and do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50 degree Celsius.

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
-> Product Type: Perfume Set

-> Pack Includes: Cuddle Monkey + 69 Oud Rose

-> Fragrance Feel: Warm, bold, sweet-spicy, woody, and luxurious

-> Suitable For: Men & Women

-> Best For: Date nights, parties, dinners, festive occasions, and special moments

-> Wear Type: Long-lasting fragrance experience

-> Mood: Seductive, confident, premium, and unforgettable

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text:
✨ Cuddle Monkey

A warm, sweet-spicy fragrance built with playful comfort and lasting depth.

Top Notes: Cardamom, Ginger, Cinnamon

Middle Notes: Candied Fruit, White Flowers, Praline

Base Notes: Coffee, Tonka Bean, Benzoin, Musk, Vanilla

🌹 69 Oud Rose

A rich oud-rose fragrance with a bold, luxurious, and long-lasting trail.

Top Notes: Pepper, Ginger, Labdanum

Middle Notes: Agarwood, Tobacco, Tonka Bean, Rose

Base Notes: Patchouli, Sandalwood, Vanilla, Amber

sections.heading: Product Benefits
sections.text:
🔥 Two Signature Moods

Cuddle Monkey gives a warm, sweet-spicy feel, while 69 Oud Rose adds a deeper, richer oud-rose charm.

✨ Creates a Memorable Presence

Both perfumes are crafted to leave a noticeable scent trail that feels confident and premium.

🌙 Perfect for Special Moments

Ideal for date nights, parties, dinners, festive plans, and evening occasions.

⏳ Long-Lasting Fragrance Feel

Deep notes like musk, vanilla, oud, amber, sandalwood, and patchouli help the scent stay longer.

🖤 Warm, Bold & Addictive Notes

A beautiful mix of spice, sweetness, oud, rose, tobacco, vanilla, and musk for a luxurious fragrance experience.

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Unisex Appeal

Designed for anyone who enjoys bold, elegant, and statement-making perfumes.
